description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a landscaped plot, featuring a central two-story structure surrounded by lush greenery and mature trees. The house is fronted by a paved driveway leading to a detached garage, with a manicured lawn and symmetrical pathways. The main building has large, prominent windows and a modest front porch, while the roof is a combination of gable and hip styles. The property is bordered by dense tree lines, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or painted concrete, with glass and metal accents. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clear separation between the living space, driveway, and garden areas.
description: A modern bungalow with a two-story central structure, large windows, a front porch, and a landscaped yard with mature trees and a detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and dense tree line in front of the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long driveway, garage, and a row of trees lining the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, open lawn, and the back facade of the bungalow with visible windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side garden, and a thick row of trees along the property boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
